scripts.dev: mkdir -p assets/css assets/js && ../../node_scripts/node_modules/.bin/sass assets-src/sass/home.scss assets/css/home.css && ../../node_scripts/node_modules/.bin/esbuild assets-src/js/home.js --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2019 --sourcemap --outfile=assets/js/home.js && ../../node_scripts/node_modules/.bin/esbuild assets-src/js/push-notifications.js --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2019 --sourcemap --outfile=assets/js/push-notifications.js && ../../node_scripts/node_modules/.bin/esbuild assets-src/js/sw.js --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2019 --sourcemap --outfile=assets/js/sw.js
scripts.build: mkdir -p assets/css assets/js && ../../node_scripts/node_modules/.bin/sass assets-src/sass/home.scss assets/css/home.css --style=compressed --no-source-map && ../../node_scripts/node_modules/.bin/esbuild assets-src/js/home.js --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2019 --minify --outfile=assets/js/home.js && ../../node_scripts/node_modules/.bin/esbuild assets-src/js/push-notifications.js --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2019 --minify --outfile=assets/js/push-notifications.js && ../../node_scripts/node_modules/.bin/esbuild assets-src/js/sw.js --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2019 --minify --outfile=assets/js/sw.js
